facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this café. Their loss. AROMA Cafe Bistro Bar Phu Quoc sits inside Happy Bear Hostel on 179 30/4 Street, easy to miss if you don't know. 4.9 stars from 454 reviews. That rating doesn't happen by accident. Good coffee, real atmosphere, zero resort markup. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walked straight past the hostel entrance. Almost missed AROMA Cafe Bistro Bar Phu Quoc. 4.9 stars. 454 reviews. Now I know why locals keep coming back. This is the one.

instagram.caption: Locals don't post about AROMA Cafe Bistro Bar Phu Quoc. 4.9 stars, 454 reviews, inside a hostel. Go find it. Tag your travel buddy.
